title: Legend for Bar Graph Widget
excerpt:
The legend (from status options) of my stacked bar graph shows the choices in alphabetical order, but I would like them to appear in the order they are listed in the column of the board. 
  
 
Is there a way to order the…

posts.author: JAMatIHDA (Jeffery Moore)
posts.cookedHtml:
The legend (from status options) of my stacked bar graph shows the choices in alphabetical order, but I would like them to appear in the order they are listed in the column of the board.

image529×174 13.7 KB

image164×325 6.41 KB

Is there a way to order the legend items the way they are listed in the board? I my case, the order would be: Good, Could be improved, Poor or None, Empty.

posts.author: YOGESHP (Yogesh Pokale)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Jeffery, are you using a Status Column for the X-axis? If so, you can drag to reorder the status labels within the Status Column settings and then that’ll be the default order in the chart for the X-axis!

image1833×886 61.4 KB

image444×399 12 KB

posts.author: JAMatIHDA (Jeffery Moore)
posts.cookedHtml:
Thanks for the reply. I am using statuses for the X-axis, and those labels are fine.

My question is about the legend below the labels, that come from the statuses populating the graph bars (that is, what is being counted). I want the legend items to be in the same order as the statuses in the board from which they come.

Below is a screenshot of one of my graphs, showing the legend items in alphabetical order, but I want them in the order: Good, Could be Improved, Poor or None, and then Empty. That is what I cannot figure out how to do.

image001.png529×466 25.5 KB

posts.author: nealb (Neal Bailey)
posts.cookedHtml:
Unless someone points out how to do it perhaps a hack would be to add

1 - Good
2 - Poor or None

Etc etc.

This way I guess they will order based on the number 1 to 9
